name: Fit for Life Pizza
recipeIngredient: Japanese eggplant (4 small, thinly sliced lengthwise)
Olives (1/2 cup, Greek, chopped) or 1 tsp dried basil
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine yeast and half a cup of each flour. Stir in hot water and olive oil. Add the remaining half-cup of each flour and salt to taste. Knead until smooth and elastic, adding more flour if needed. Rest for at least 5 minutes.
2. Preheat oven to 500°F. Oil two cookie sheets with olive oil. Arrange eggplant, zucchini, mushrooms, and onion slices on one sheet. Combine remaining olive oil with crushed garlic and brush vegetables well. Bake in oven for 5 minutes.
3. Roll dough into a large, thin round (16-inch) or rectangle to fit a cookie sheet. Brush lightly with olive oil and dust with cornmeal. Transfer to baking pan.
4. Remove grilled vegetables from oven. Brush crust generously with pesto. Layer eggplant, zucchini, mushrooms, onion, sun-dried tomatoes, fresh tomatoes, olives, basil (fresh or dried), and oregano on top. Place in oven for 15-20 minutes or until lightly browned.
5. Remove from oven and cut into slices or squares.
